aal_active_axioma_user_idx.name: aal_active_axioma_user_idx
aal_active_axioma_user_idx.where: "state" = 'linked' AND "revoked_at" IS NULL AND "axioma_user_id" IS NOT NULL

lessons_embed_html_payload_check.name: lessons_embed_html_payload_check
lessons_embed_html_payload_check.value: (("lessons"."content_type" = 'embed' AND "lessons"."embed_html" IS NOT NULL) OR ("lessons"."content_type" <> 'embed' AND "lessons"."embed_html" IS NULL))

materials_file_lifecycle_check.name: materials_file_lifecycle_check
materials_file_lifecycle_check.value:
(
        ("materials"."kind" = 'file' AND "materials"."storage_provider" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."storage_key" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."scan_status" IN ('pending', 'clean', 'quarantined', 'failed') AND "materials"."retained_until" IS NOT NULL)
        OR
        ("materials"."kind" <> 'file' AND "materials"."storage_provider" IS NULL AND "materials"."storage_key" IS NULL AND "materials"."scan_status" = 'not_required' AND "materials"."scan_checked_at" IS NULL AND "materials"."quarantine_reason" IS NULL AND "materials"."retained_until" IS NULL)
      )

materials_payload_check.name: materials_payload_check
materials_payload_check.value:
(
        ("materials"."kind" = 'link' AND "materials"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."file_name" IS NULL AND "materials"."mime_type" IS NULL AND "materials"."size_bytes" IS NULL AND "materials"."content_sha256" IS NULL AND "materials"."file_bytes_base64" IS NULL AND "materials"."embed_html" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("materials"."kind" = 'file' AND "materials"."url" IS NULL AND "materials"."file_name" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."mime_type" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."size_bytes" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."size_bytes" > 0 AND "materials"."content_sha256" IS NOT NULL AND "materials"."embed_html" IS NULL AND (
          ("materials"."storage_provider" = 'db-local' AND "materials"."file_bytes_base64" IS NOT NULL)
          OR
          ("materials"."storage_provider" <> 'db-local' AND "materials"."file_bytes_base64" IS NULL)
        ))
        OR
        ("materials"."kind" = 'embed' AND "materials"."url" IS NULL AND "materials"."file_name" IS NULL AND "materials"."mime_type" IS NULL AND "materials"."size_bytes" IS NULL AND "materials"."content_sha256" IS NULL AND "materials"."file_bytes_base64" IS NULL AND "materials"."embed_html" IS NOT NULL)
      )
